HoverPower.UI.Title: Mochi's Blue Scrubber
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.Info:
Mochi's color picker.
 Default hotkey: H
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.Close: Close/Exit. Default hotkey: H or click on the Game top-left icon does the same.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.ResetOutline: Outline: click to reset color and alpha (opacity) to game defaults.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.ResetFill: Fill: click to reset to game defaults. Vanilla fill is 0% for normal building hover.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.FillOpacity: Opacity of the fill inside the hovered outline. 0% = no inner fill, 100% = full fill.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.ResetGuidelines: Guidelines: click to reset to mod defaults. Both this slider + Options menu slider stay in sync.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.GuidelinesOpacity: Guidelines opacity. Below 15% is not advised because the guides may become hard to see.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.SurfaceToggle:
Hide Surface tool boundary preview lines.
Default hotkey: L.
HoverPower.UI.Tooltip.Reset: Reset Outline back to game defaults.
